missingReleaseInputs: Four 512-bit node public keys and reachable enode URLs
Public IP addresses or DNS targets for every validator host
A distinct native-gas treasury address and reviewed genesis allocations
A final genesis timestamp and signed genesis ceremony approval
An edge proxy with TLS, authentication, rate limiting, and DDoS controls
safetyNotes: Addresses are public identifiers only; they do not prove validator control.
A Cloudflare wildcard may resolve the proposed hostnames to the generic website, but it is not an RPC service, an edge route, or a P2P endpoint.
No RPC service, genesis file, validator process, Safe, contract, token, or custody system is created by this record.
Validator private keys must stay under separate operator control outside this repository.
